title: Canballat #5571
definition:
Sanballat = "strength"

 1) a Moabite of Horonaim and the opponent of Nehemiah and the returned
    exiles in their goal of rebuilding the walls of Jerusalem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Sanballat = "strength"

 1) a Moabite of Horonaim and the opponent of Nehemiah and the returned
    exiles in their goal of rebuilding the walls of Jerusalem

    NASB:  a Samaritan leader
